# ASK query, JSON results.
endpoint: sparql_query
classification: spec-required
match_mode: structural-json
description: ASK query returns boolean false on empty store, JSON format

=== request
GET /sparql?query=ASK%20%7B%20%3Fs%20%3Fp%20%3Fo%20%7D
Accept: application/sparql-results+json

=== response
200
Content-Type: application/sparql-results+json

{"head":{},"boolean":false}
